message:
Running command: 
# Python drainer is working! Groups progressing (10000 groups just completed).
# Now monitor DRT progress - keep draining and checking

echo "=== Monitoring DRT2 with pipe drain ==="
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
    sleep 30
    echo "=== Check $i: $(date) ==="
    
    # Show recent progress
    BYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    echo "  Pipe log: $BYTES bytes"
    tail -8 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null
    echo "---"
    
    # Check for new steps and final
    RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
    LATEST=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -3 | grep -v "error\|flow\|resolved\|tmp\|warning")
    echo "  Latest dirs: $LATEST"
    
    # Check process
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "  CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}' || echo "  OpenROAD EXITED"
    
    # Check final
    ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null | head -3 && echo "  === FINAL ===" && break
    
    # Break if no OpenROAD
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "  OpenROAD done" && break
done

function.name: execute_bash
